category_sources: source_facts.description says chamber manages secrets through AWS SSM Parameter Store; official GitHub README describes Chamber as a secrets management tool using SSM Parameter Store.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Chamber; source_facts.name is chamber.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install, authentication, migration, and usage information; README links to the official GitHub wiki for additional installation options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/segmentio/chamber; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify CLI secrets management through AWS SSM Parameter Store, AWS authentication, and Go installation.
